managePreferences: Manage your app preferences and cache settings
fixesOutdated: Fixes issues with outdated app versions
forcesFreshData: Forces fresh data from servers when needed
clearCacheDescription: Clear Cache: When experiencing data inconsistencies or after app updates
forceReloadDescription: Force Reload: When the app seems stuck or unresponsive
checkUpdatesDescription: Check Updates: To manually check for new app versions
installAppDescription: Install App: For better performance and offline access
customizeAudioPreferences: Customize your audio preferences for match scoring
turnOnAudioFeedback: Turn on audio feedback for match events
pointSoundsDescription: Basic point scoring, aces, double faults
criticalPointSoundsDescription: Break points, set points, match points
matchEventSoundsDescription: Game won, set won, match completion
soundEffectsInfo: 💡 Sound effects will initialize automatically when you start scoring points. Volume and settings are saved automatically.
